clean_body: Hey friends, I’m Eddie Geller, and I’m running for Congress here in my home state of Florida. If you’ll indulge me for just a few paragraphs, I’d like to tell you why. Here’s something you might not expect: I used to be a comedian. Yes, really! And let’s be honest, it’s so easy to throw up our hands in despair when confronted by everything that’s going on in our world (more on that in a minute). So, to keep people engaged, and to keep them in this fight alongside me, I try to make folks laugh to give them a breather from the madness. In fact, to do exactly that, I even made this launch video — watch it now (beware the extremely catchy jingle) [] ! Now, on a more serious note: I’m a millennial. And almost all the other millennials I know share this feeling of existential dread. Dread that the planet is warming beyond our control. That we can’t afford health care. That our parents got the good jobs and affordable housing, and we’ll be stuck working in the gig economy and paying 50% of our income in rent for the rest of our foreseeable lives. And then, when we look at Congress, we don’t see ourselves represented. We see millionaires who are more concerned with satisfying their wealthy donors than ensuring the wellbeing of everyday Americans. Well, quite frankly, I’ve had enough. I believe that good people need to run for office — because we need good people in Congress who are willing to step up, take risks, and do good things. People who understand the sheer weight of their responsibility to their district, their neighbors, and their communities. That is the kind of representation I want to bring to Florida’s 15th District. Not an empty suit or a corporate puppet — somebody real, with their finger on the pulse of their community, their heart in the right place, and their elbow somewhere between their wrist and their shoulder. Because listen, we’re running out of time . The planet is running out of time. Nobody knows this better than Floridians, and no state in the country is more at risk from the effects of climate change. We can do what needs to be done — you know, actually helping people who need it, like our representatives are supposed to — by winning Florida’s 15th District. Nothing less than the future of our species, and how we choose to care for our neighbors and fellow Americans, is hanging in the balance. So, what do you think? Will you join me? It’s not gonna be easy, but if we pull together like I know we can, we can deliver real leadership for FL-15 to Congress. We’re building this grassroots campaign from the ground up, and we need your help — can you make a donation of any amount now? [] Stay tuned — this is just the beginning. I’m so glad to have you on board. — Eddie P.S. If anyone has a better description of where your elbow resides, please respond to this email. Terry’s opponent says he’s proud to have Donald Trump’s endorsement. He even added “Donald Trump represents so much of why I’m running.”

And he’s putting his money where his mouth is. He has supported Donald Trump’s anti-democratic conspiracy theories and pushed an agenda of restricting voter access.

On the other hand, Terry is a champion for our freedom to vote. As Governor, he restored voting rights to more people than any other Governor in history. He fought hard to make sure Virginia was one of the most welcoming, inclusive and forward-looking places in the country. But if Terry’s opponent wins, he’ll take the Commonwealth backwards.

**In state after state across the country, we have seen that governors play a large role in determining whether access is restricted or expanded. We must hold the line in Virginia to protect and expand progress.**

So here is the deal: if we do our part to elect Terry in Virginia, we can send a message to the entire country that our Democracy is stronger than ever. We can demonstrate that candidates who support voter suppression and Donald Trump’s big lie will be met with a groundswell of grassroots resistance.

**[Please, donate to Terry’s campaign right now and become a part of his historic movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35985936/306771415/-2023814932?refcode=20210918.2_SA_9DK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTY2MmE1MC04NDE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J516t0WKlYX5wxWTd4tmuemxemzYME5_SCGF08Pr5QQ=)**

body:
Coming to you with a humble request...

Peter, It's Dan Crenshaw. I just got this text and my heart sank:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58353036:6LfzzC2dN:m:1:3253819041:09E8C89AD4EBFE5518B670ABA45F3992:r)
This is bad. _Really bad._

I know this isn't what you want to hear right now: **_but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn't an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good._**

[**300% MATCH NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58353036:6LfzzC2dN:m:1:3253819041:09E8C89AD4EBFE5518B670ABA45F3992:r)

I REFUSE to sit back and allow the Radical Left to take over our country. I know you won't either, which is why today I'm coming to you with a humble request:

[**Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58353036:6LfzzC2dN:m:1:3253819041:09E8C89AD4EBFE5518B670ABA45F3992:r)

I can't extend this offer to everyone and I can only offer it to you for a limited time - but it's critical you rush support before the deadline. _If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it 's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball. _

[**BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we 'll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58353036:6LfzzC2dN:m:1:3253819041:09E8C89AD4EBFE5518B670ABA45F3992:r)

name: Karen Bass
subject: It's time to bring policing into the 21st century
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Team,

I wanted to give an update on the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act. I've been working alongside Senator Cory Booker (NJ) and negotiating with other lawmakers to make this necessary legislation law.

Let me be clear: I've not given up on reaching a deal on this historic policing reform legislation. Lives depend on it.

The George Floyd Justice in Policing Act is about bringing policing into the 21st century. It will ban no-knock warrants and the use of deadly chokeholds, and it will create a national standard for policing. Accountability and justice for all should be the default -- not the exception. We will NOT move on until our policing system is reformed.

**[We need to show the Senate that we the people are fully behind the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act becoming the law of the land. Add your name to my petition now to demand leaders send this legislation to President Joe Biden's desk for a signature »](https://act.myngp.com/el/tquyjhgAqI8SKJvJBrfK1ZAkEEHaTO4TkPEYuicKaJQ=/qor6KmtBa9ymYVlucaD1yWb21M4ZGyAxuwnco6pAdCQ=?ms=em21_210918_jipa_adv_gq_act___kb_ettx_alask1&source=em21_210918_jipa_adv_gq_act___kb_ettx_alask1&utm_campaign=em21_210918_jipa_adv_gq_act___kb_ettx_alask1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

[SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.myngp.com/el/tquyjhgAqI8SKJvJBrfK1ZAkEEHaTO4TkPEYuicKaJQ=/qor6KmtBa9ymYVlucaD1yWb21M4ZGyAxuwnco6pAdCQ=?ms=em21_210918_jipa_adv_gq_act___kb_ettx_albbt1&source=em21_210918_jipa_adv_gq_act___kb_ettx_albbt1&utm_campaign=em21_210918_jipa_adv_gq_act___kb_ettx_albbt1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})
---

Team, we have to keep the conversation about justice in policing at the forefront of public discourse. I'm turning to you today to see if you're still with me in this important fight.

**[Will you sign the petition now demanding the Senate bring the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act to a vote?](https://act.myngp.com/el/tquyjhgAqI8SKJvJBrfK1ZAkEEHaTO4TkPEYuicKaJQ=/qor6KmtBa9ymYVlucaD1yWb21M4ZGyAxuwnco6pAdCQ=?ms=em21_210918_jipa_adv_gq_act___kb_ettx_alask2&source=em21_210918_jipa_adv_gq_act___kb_ettx_alask2&utm_campaign=em21_210918_jipa_adv_gq_act___kb_ettx_alask2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

In solidarity,

Karen

Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress

Washington, DC 20003 United States

Like many families, mine faced enormous challenges. I know that people are struggling, and I want to be part of the solution to get them what they need to get them back on their feet.

name: John Cranley
subject: re: climate change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
We can't forget about the U.N.’s climate report. | **“A CODE RED for humanity.”** That’s the warning the United Nations Chief issued after a recent report on the consequences of human-caused climate change. Friend, the fact is, we’re out of time. Permanent change to our environment is inevitable — but we can still decide just how bad the future will be. We can stick to the status quo and accept a world where drought is rampant, wildfires are larger, sea-level rise endangers coastal cities, and so much more.**Or, we can take drastic action on a societal level — starting right now — and limit the damage.** Unfortunately, the Republicans in Columbus have passed a law making it harder for clean energy businesses to bring jobs to our state. In Cincinnati, we are doing things differently. We are creating the largest municipal solar project in the country, because it’s good for our environment and good for our economy. As governor, I’ll incentivize green solutions and invest in clean energy jobs. clean_body: We can't forget about the U.N.’s climate report. | “A CODE RED for humanity.” That’s the warning the United Nations Chief issued after a recent report on the consequences of human-caused climate change. Friend, the fact is, we’re out of time. Permanent change to our environment is inevitable — but we can still decide just how bad the future will be. We can stick to the status quo and accept a world where drought is rampant, wildfires are larger, sea-level rise endangers coastal cities, and so much more.Or, we can take drastic action on a societal level — starting right now — and limit the damage. Unfortunately, the Republicans in Columbus have passed a law making it harder for clean energy businesses to bring jobs to our state. In Cincinnati, we are doing things differently. We are creating the largest municipal solar project in the country, because it’s good for our environment and good for our economy. As governor, I’ll incentivize green solutions and invest in clean energy jobs. I commit to adding 120,000 new jobs to our economy while prioritizing investments in clean infrastructure — because we can protect our environment and expand the economy all at once. Listen, Ohio’s comeback story has to begin with a commitment to fighting climate change. If we can’t save our planet, nothing else matters. None of us want our children to live in fear of famine or destructive weather events — it’s certainly not the future I hope my son will enjoy. But if we’re going to leave the next generation a planet that will sustain them, we can’t afford to wait any longer. Our global fight against climate change has to start right now, including here in Ohio. Thank you, John = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. clean_body: We can’t let that happen. | | | Look, Derek, let’s face it -- the Republican party is now the party of Donald Trump, whether we like it or not. Their candidate for Governor said Trump represents so much of why he’s running, and he’s gotten Trump’s endorsement 3 times so far. Their Lieutenant Governor candidate ran a pro-Trump effort in 2020 and has doubled down on Trump’s divisive policies. We need a Lt. Governor who’ll fight for Virginia, Derek. That’s why we’re asking you to support Delegate Hala Ayala, who spent her time improving foster care, feeding students in need, and expanding veteran benefits in Virginia. Recent polling has this race as a real nail-biter, and Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight calls Virginia the most competitive election of 2021. We can’t leave it up to chance, Derek -- Virginia is counting on us. \-- Common Good VA | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . name: Adam Schiff
subject: The Freedom to Vote Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek, If Mitch McConnell has his way, the Senate isn’t going to lift a finger to protect voting rights from the right-wing assault Republican legislatures are waging across the country. **And as long as Democrats in the Senate refuse to abolish the filibuster, that’s exactly what is going to happen.** This week, Mitch McConnell said Republicans _“will not be letting Washington Democrats abuse their razor-thin majorities in both chambers to overrule state and local governments and appoint themselves a national Board of Elections on steroids.”_ You and I both know that couldn’t be further from the truth. It’s no surprise that Mitch McConnell is creating a warped, false narrative behind the _Freedom to Vote Act_ because he's one of the figureheads for the party of lies, voter suppression, and autocracy. McConnell filibustered the _For the People Act_ and the _John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_ without giving either bill a second thought. And Republican legislatures have taken full advantage by passing extreme voter suppression laws – just as recently as last week in Texas. I’m not going to sugarcoat it. The midterm elections are going to be tough — even tougher than what we experienced in 2020. In 2010, when our country was just emerging from another economic crisis, Republicans swept 63 new seats in the House and broke our majority. And President Obama’s agenda sputtered in the face of zealous GOP opposition. If that happens again next year, that would decimate our slim House majority and set our progress back decades. We can’t allow it. And we won’t. If we do what is necessary, we can win, just as we did so resoundingly in California’s GOP recall election. There’s simply too much at stake — healthcare, the environment, and yes, our democracy. **Can you pitch in $10 or $25 right now? We need every resource possible to defend our democracy, and with the FEC deadline around the corner, every dollar right now makes a significant difference.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35990673/306788718/581033598?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20210918_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDk0YjgyMS04ZTE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jX9Yb9Omm1h1HBdOODkbFuBJoC0p7RJIohPMdj7OKyU=)

My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse. As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. **Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? But one thing I’ve learned throughout my career in service is that when the mission is this important, you have to stay focused. = Together we can accomplish great things, Marcus Flowers = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress Contributions to Seth Moulton For Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Folks, we’re on the verge of passing urgent climate legislation that would drastically reduce carbon emissions and create good-paying jobs. It’s a huge step toward a clean-energy future. I’m fighting for a rebate program to help folks affordably electrify their homes and vehicles, and for a clean-energy standard. This fight is personal to me. I want to leave my two sons with the New Mexico lands and waters I love so much, and keep our planet livable for everyone. We need to get this right. I’m treating it like our last chance to make a real difference in the fight against climate change — because it very well could be. I rallied with conservation leaders outside the Capitol last week to demand immediate action on climate from my colleagues. Then, I went straight to work to make these calls to action a reality. **But Republicans are doing everything they can to block meaningful action, and I’m counting on your support to keep up this fight. name: Culp for Congress
subject: September 17th was Constitution Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS**
body:
| | _[View online](https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=Bwjj4P&mc=JH&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EFObI6P&)_
---
| | |
---
| | **September 17th was Constitution Day in America.**
---
| | ** ****As Americans, we should take time to study our nation's founding documents and appreciate the exceptionalism of our Constitutional Republic.**** ** Studying the constitution doesn't have to be overwhelming. A great resource for the constitution is [_Hillsdale College_](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=S2Jx4K&mc=JH&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EQMgMdw&) _._ They offer free online courses and I would recommend getting the whole family involved.
**Under the Biden Administration, we are seeing our Constitution be trampled and our rights ignored.**
We've seen blatant overreach by the Federal Government under Biden and the Pelosi**-** controlled House as they seek to federalize elections and undermine states' rights. The 10th amendment clearly states, _**“The powers not delegated to the United States by the Constitution, nor prohibited by it to the States, are reserved to the States respectively, or to the people.”**_** **The 10th amendment of our nation's constitution is a powerful one and is worth reading and studying.
We must know our nation's laws in order to protect them. Learn more about the 10th amendment [_here._](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=S2Jx6S&mc=JH&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EQ17w5z&)

---
|
---
**Where are the Republicans and why aren't they doing something about it?**
When you are elected as a public servant you swear to uphold the United States Constitution. We expect the radical left to ignore and break the oath they swore, but I'm tired of RINO's like Newhouse who break their oath. We the people deserve representatives who will vote constitutionally and remember that they're not politicians but public servants.
**We must stand up for America.**
The time is now. We need to work together. I can't do this alone. It will take every country**-** loving American to protect our Constitutional Republic.We will win, and we will be the free country we know and love.
**_Let's take a stand._**
Loren

name: CheriBeasley.com
subject: Historically, African American women running for Congress raised only about half of what white candidates raised.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Too often the traditional gatekeepers and political establishment have doubted the ability of African American women to win.
#

There is a stark lack of diversity in the Senate right now. Despite representing half the population, there are only 24 women in the Senate and no African American women.
If we’re going to have a government that reflects the diversity of this nation, we need to be honest about some of the reasons that it doesn’t already.
One of the biggest obstacles that African American women running for office must confront is fundraising.
In 2018, the Center for Responsive Politics’ analysis said, **“The average Black female candidate raised 46 percent less than the average white male candidate, but she also raised 55 percent less than the average white female candidate.”**
[**If you’re ready to help us change this statistic, make a $3 donation to our campaign today. We have an incredible opportunity to give North Carolina new leadership by electing Cheri, but it’s going to take each of us playing a role in this fight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35994147/306802370/1741212721?refcode2=b9b84ac0-9718-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210918-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWI4NGFjMC05NzE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6fp3yFwhMZRwyp1SjDwRJHGrAwvaXd8vuokBdk0kxf0=)
Too often the traditional gatekeepers and political establishment have doubted the ability of African American women to win.
**The fact is we know not only can Cheri win, but she is Democrats’ best chance to flip this seat. She leads in every public poll of our primary and is the only Democrat who has won statewide before.**
But we have to make sure our campaign has the resources necessary to compete and challenge any question of if Cheri has what it takes to win.
[**If you can, please consider making a $3 donation to help us make history by electing Cheri as North Carolina’s first African American Senator. Cheri has spent her career fighting for justice for the people, and we can trust her to be a voice for US in the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35994148/306802371/1741212721?refcode2=b9b84ac0-9718-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210918-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWI4NGFjMC05NzE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6fp3yFwhMZRwyp1SjDwRJHGrAwvaXd8vuokBdk0kxf0=)
The obstacles we face in this campaign may be daunting at times, but together, we can overcome them and open the doors of opportunity for every North Carolinian.
\- Team Beasley

clean_body: Too often the traditional gatekeepers and political establishment have doubted the ability of African American women to win. There is a stark lack of diversity in the Senate right now. Despite representing half the population, there are only 24 women in the Senate and no African American women. If we’re going to have a government that reflects the diversity of this nation, we need to be honest about some of the reasons that it doesn’t already. One of the biggest obstacles that African American women running for office must confront is fundraising. In 2018, the Center for Responsive Politics’ analysis said, “The average Black female candidate raised 46 percent less than the average white male candidate, but she also raised 55 percent less than the average white female candidate.” = Too often the traditional gatekeepers and political establishment have doubted the ability of African American women to win. The fact is we know not only can Cheri win, but she is Democrats’ best chance to flip this seat. She leads in every public poll of our primary and is the only Democrat who has won statewide before. But we have to make sure our campaign has the resources necessary to compete and challenge any question of if Cheri has what it takes to win. = The obstacles we face in this campaign may be daunting at times, but together, we can overcome them and open the doors of opportunity for every North Carolinian. \- Team Beasley = * Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina Cheri Beasley for North Carolina PO Box 28778 Raleigh, NC 27611 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Roger Marshall
subject: Lawless Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL
body:
| |
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/a131b9bcbac65af9/df46c168b95f7244c3d6b838967d376c)
|
---
# ** — From day one, the theme of Joe Biden’s administration has been Americans Last.**

---
He reversed President Trump’s border policies that were working in pursuit of a dangerous and radical open borders, pro-amnesty agenda. This created a crisis, which I saw firsthand at the border earlier this year.

Fortunately, the rule of law is standing in Joe Biden’s way — as we saw last month when the Supreme Court ordered the “Remain in Mexico” policy be reinstated. And another court blocked his attempt to undermine ICE and kneecap immigration enforcement.

[**I wrote an op-ed about this in The Washington Times**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/a131b9bcbac65af9/061883dbc999ff31c3d6b838967d376c), and I hope you’ll read it and share with your friends.

There’s a lot more that must be done to reverse the damage, end the crisis, and secure the border. I intend to continue leading that fight.

Thank you for standing with us.

-Senator Roger Marshall
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/a131b9bcbac65af9/f2325dd9c60b5e6dc3d6b838967d376c)
**Supreme Court Taking Aim At Lawless Biden**
By Senator Roger Marshall

Joe Biden has persistently and purposely reversed effective border policies implemented by former President Trump to pursue a radical, open border, pro-amnesty agenda. Thankfully for families and communities, the rule of law is standing in his way.

Last month, the Supreme Court delivered a stinging blow to Joe Biden’s agenda and a win for Americans when it ordered the Biden administration to reinstate former President Trump’s ‘Remain in Mexico’ policy. The policy requires those claiming asylum at the southern border to wait in Mexico while their case goes through the court process. This policy was put in place because federal officials have assessed many migrants apprehended at the southern border are making bogus claims of asylum – “gaming the system,” you could say – forcing a quick release into the United States, where they can wait for years while their court case is processed. The Supreme Court ruled the Biden administration likely violated federal law in its efforts to rescind this humane, common sense, and necessary program.

The Remain in Mexico policy has been crucial to border patrol’s efforts to handle the historic tide of illegal immigrants entering our country. More than 210,000 people were apprehended at the southern border in July – the highest monthly total in more than two decades. There have been more than one million apprehensions at the border since January 1st. More than 60,000 people claiming asylum have waited in Mexico because of the Remain in Mexico policy.

This decision by the Supreme Court is the latest development in a growing list of failures by the Biden administration to subvert the rule of law in an attempt to further an un-American open borders agenda which puts American families at risk and undermines our nation’s sovereignty.

[**Read more here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/a131b9bcbac65af9/bbd6f9389778270dc3d6b838967d376c)****
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/a131b9bcbac65af9/b8796234e57027fcc3d6b838967d376c)
|
---
|
---

[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/a131b9bcbac65af9/600cacc9c62e7d2bc3d6b838967d376c)

Doc is defending life. He's standing for our jobs, our families, and our faith.

**He's taking our Kansas values to the U.S. Senate, but he can't get it done without your help.**

We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference.

However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694&c=37973&jid=a131b9bcbac65af9&d=9fba4e0a7abe5dbbc3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694&c=37973&jid=a131b9bcbac65af9).

subject: My opponent's comments are anti-Semitic and have no place in our Commonwealth
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Jay Jones
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/xgvm40qkWZBXIm-Jk6LZh6ie7LtdIphIqn_soXmpQBU=/v1-MIh6JQOIqt95YdT0k-0I5iORbHzDCWo25aly_gEA=)
---
Friend -- Last night, my Republican opponent Hahns Copeland made vile, anti-Semitic [comments](https://act.myngp.com/el/xgvm40qkWZBXIm-Jk6LZh6ie7LtdIphIqn_soXmpQBU=/pE2HQEDdAibJZk155k2fiH1tPkz5kTa2JidMikZH75U=?s=20) on Twitter attacking my friend and colleague House Speaker Eileen Filler-Corn. And what did Glenn Youngkin and his cronies have to say about it? Nothing. Let me be clear: Hahns Copeland is a bigot, and his dangerous, hateful rhetoric has no place in our Commonwealth or the 89th District. [**That 's why I'm asking you directly for a contribution today so we can defeat Hahns Copeland and Glenn Youngkin and keep Virginia blue this November.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/xgvm40qkWZBXIm-Jk6LZh6ie7LtdIphIqn_soXmpQBU=/nSNcUUWtl7lsKmS5TZEiOoTStkj5DkV3DOo4FsUTqeI=) I'm working hard every day to win re-election to the House and help elect Democrats up and down the ticket, but extreme Republicans like Glenn Youngkin and Hahns Copeland will stop at nothing to turn back the clocks on the progress we've made with their divisive rhetoric and bigotry. This Commonwealth needs fresh voices and ideas as we enter this new Virginia decade that reflect who we are, what we value, and where we're going. My commitment to giving a voice to those left behind is unflinching, and we will work tirelessly over the years ahead to make Virginia stronger and more just for every citizen. That starts with keeping our Democratic Majority in the House and securing another statewide sweep this year. [**I hope you will join me by making a contribution today!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/xgvm40qkWZBXIm-Jk6LZh6ie7LtdIphIqn_soXmpQBU=/nSNcUUWtl7lsKmS5TZEiOoTStkj5DkV3DOo4FsUTqeI=) This is too important. Our future depends on it. \- Jay Jones

name: John Fetterman
subject: re: Some bad news on Joe Manchin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Senator Manchin said Democrats “will not have [his] vote” on the budget bill.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210918-2654-header&t=1&akid=2654%2E434096%2E0Tg_Ub)
Peter,
As you may know by now, Joe Manchin has proclaimed that Senate Democrats “will not have [his] vote” on President Biden’s $3.5 trillion Build Back Better plan.
Seriously.
It’s a huge blow to the president’s agenda, and an even bigger blow to the working families of Pennsylvania and the USA who need our help.
**I believe Democrats should vote like Democrats.** If we don’t, we’ll be voting under the terms and policies set by Republicans.
**We **need** that 51st Democratic vote in the U.S. Senate to get shit done.****I’ll be that guy — but only if we can run a strong enough campaign to flip PA blue.**
[Will you donate $5 to flip PA blue and lock in the 51st vote we need to pass these big and important policies? If you can, chip in now.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29998?refcode=em20210918-2654&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2654%2E434096%2E0Tg_Ub)
Democrats have the House.
Democrats have the Senate.
Democrats have the White House.
Peter, if we don’t pass the stuff we got elected to pass right now, when **are** we going to pass it?
I promise you this. If you elect me, I will not patiently wait for 10 Republicans to hop on board before voting my conscience. I will vote to get stuff done.
[If that sounds good to you, please consider donating to my campaign today. Make a $5 contribution to flip PA blue and get 51 votes for our agenda.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29998?refcode=em20210918-2654&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2654%2E434096%2E0Tg_Ub)
— John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210918-2654-footer&t=4&refcode2=2654_434096_0Tg_Ub&akid=2654%2E434096%2E0Tg_Ub)**

We need that 51st Democratic vote in the U.S. Senate to get shit done.I’ll be that guy — but only if we can run a strong enough campaign to flip PA blue. Democrats have the House. Democrats have the Senate. Democrats have the White House. Peter, if we don’t pass the stuff we got elected to pass right now, when are we going to pass it? I promise you this. If you elect me, I will not patiently wait for 10 Republicans to hop on board before voting my conscience. I will vote to get stuff done. — John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

Friend --

In a moment I'm going to ask you to [**chip in $3**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35997087/306809886/77586780?refcode=em-91821-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjI5NTVkZi05YTE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-toVCv29964GCFHdBqvpj1s4uYfLYMklBDV7PU05wgc=) to my people-powered campaign for Congress. But first, I want to tell you more about why I'm running, and discuss an issue I care deeply about.

At my first job out of college, I witnessed my company move manufacturing to Mexico and lay off all the assembly workers. Many of them had no career options and never worked a decent paying job again. This left a profound impact on me, and was a clear proof point that we live in a country tilted toward the top 1% with an economy that focuses on short-term corporate gains at human cost.

Just 650 American billionaires gained over $1 trillion in wealth during the pandemic. Meanwhile, over 650,000 Americans died, thousands were forced into homelessness, and millions couldn't afford to pay rent or were evicted.

**Wealth inequality is the biggest challenge we face, and I'm running for Congress to be part of the solution. That means incentivizing high-wage jobs and making historic investments in health care infrastructure, housing, and debt-free education. It also means making sure the top 0.1% pay a wealth tax.**

Our tax system is riddled with loopholes for the ultra-wealthy. Earlier this year _ProPublica_ revealed that wealthy billionaires like Jeff Bezos kept taxable income so low that they qualified for and took the child tax credit. That's illogical, and we must change this absurd tax system.

subject: Tell Biden: NO VACCINE MANDATE

body:
Joe Biden just issued a nationwide vaccine mandate, telling virtually every American business that they must force their employees to get the vaccine Now every single working American is going to have to choose between their job or getting the vaccine. Not only will this make vaccine hesitation worse, but this is an unconstitutional, |
---
Fellow Conservative,

America has lived through 18 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin. [**Now that things have a chance to get back on track, Joe Biden keeps holding us back.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=24de1a29a7e9446fbb4356a9a41ca05d&_e=bLBq0kPdyqE_P7ubsehN3f9LdLEaVJw24WwyloKTxNeLIdwnmj02MROK3DSuG8j801Ot9mg6XUcCrjGr54pkRBJO1CcT4DExl9jYZ-NgVifFV7uGPkRC8MIWraQabt3Dvibqxbcm0JpppaYkM581w-i8Q97J9MgzF5ueNJfvMHPgUm9kvIMBUJIow1LiAp6UHDH60Kw7fAlGTXb_LPcu5qK9k5vtFtl-Fc-FORKthpHfwt2FCJONHR_GS3HNTjoXRUCw5D6Ebz0VBvlhLIn0PNaJ_cpDfjG5YznIRJo9MsBhI-DkC53ieogRbGVkNTWXpzCPyTn2ZWxf-nn1Q5hiwA_cRIZhBYHZY2Q_Got7eeQ1b1MWBtrawmR2I1DGOFwc4lJMklIwnKk8HnlIEVY_YOsDcNP9VJbqjiElSgPkczBYfLxZVuqxGRIdgJg7vogS8B6bwzyw4s07HRzgE7XjaQ-Xhin9C5WPSB4pcUXDNisSBtSdhsiFO96w3KdKp8Apz4_hnXSfmV3WxJ-CsW1x9gc0zvxTIxCGzGtO79q6olnLyp2N4Js5XwS514AexT2IJusrJc06O50loW57Xgo5DBxiWLh47e-r74oQkyRZo4bQojNmLvwrWQuLy0ELw7V1)

**Biden just issued a nationwide vaccine mandate, telling many American businesses that they must force their employees to get the vaccine or face serious fines** - **$14,000 PER EMPLOYEE WHO IS NOT VACCINATED.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=24de1a29a7e9446fbb4356a9a41ca05d&_e=bLBq0kPdyqE_P7ubsehN3f9LdLEaVJw24WwyloKTxNeLIdwnmj02MROK3DSuG8j801Ot9mg6XUcCrjGr54pkRBJO1CcT4DExl9jYZ-NgVifFV7uGPkRC8MIWraQabt3Dvibqxbcm0JpppaYkM581w-i8Q97J9MgzF5ueNJfvMHPgUm9kvIMBUJIow1LiAp6UHDH60Kw7fAlGTXb_LPcu5qK9k5vtFtl-Fc-FORKthpHfwt2FCJONHR_GS3HNTjoXRUCw5D6Ebz0VBvlhLIn0PNaJ_cpDfjG5YznIRJo9MsBhI-DkC53ieogRbGVkNTWXpzCPyTn2ZWxf-nn1Q5hiwA_cRIZhBYHZY2Q_Got7eeQ1b1MWBtrawmR2I1DGOFwc4lJMklIwnKk8HnlIEVY_YOsDcNP9VJbqjiElSgPkczCnoQjjADP7gt0UOGeBEkt5lYeQa-w0Ir51j_faZI4_dImhELmhPRGzxKVq__nVFg6NBTXFVf0y4TItTT0U7n0XyrWJGdXk85g5ivVMnmQy_ukJqJnzk84kampVsoIy1GIJgSRgwpKribntHKMadTzptoueQlsG1XJ0qDa8KBM3F_YHPKGcgRwBNBT8tKxPrZpWyuNOaqN_2VNdXQX_WlDz)

Millions of working and unvaccinated Americans could have to choose between their job or getting the vaccine. I am glad everybody who wants to get the vaccine can do so - but this mandate is an **unconstitutional, egregious abuse of power.**

We cannot let him get away with this authoritarian action. [**We need to make our voices heard and tell Joe that we will not sit back while he controls every aspect of Americans’ lives. clean_body: Joe Biden just issued a nationwide vaccine mandate, telling virtually every American business that they must force their employees to get the vaccine Now every single working American is going to have to choose between their job or getting the vaccine. Not only will this make vaccine hesitation worse, but this is an unconstitutional, | Fellow Conservative, America has lived through 18 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin. Biden just issued a nationwide vaccine mandate, telling many American businesses that they must force their employees to get the vaccine or face serious fines - $14,000 PER EMPLOYEE WHO IS NOT VACCINATED. Millions of working and unvaccinated Americans could have to choose between their job or getting the vaccine. I am glad everybody who wants to get the vaccine can do so - but this mandate is an unconstitutional, egregious abuse of power. We cannot let him get away with this authoritarian action. Thank you, Yvette Herrell (R-NM) | Born and raised in New Mexico, Yvette Herrell served for 4 terms in the New Mexico House of Representatives. Yvette puts people before politics, championing our small businesses and representing our rural values in Washington. ---|--- | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY YVETTE4CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

| | | _Rep. Allison Russo will kickoff our Athens community canvass today, Saturday the 18th, at Athens Dems HQ at noon!_
---
| |
---
#### **Come meet Rep. Allison Russo at the Athens Dems Community Canvass today at 12pm! **

You’ll get an update on the state of the race to **#Flipthe15th** , discuss our Southeast Ohio organizing strategy, and then head out to knock on doors with Allison

#### [**RSVP NOW**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=5c1077afd2&e=400a181d5a)
##
---
|
---
| _Can’t make it to Athens tomorrow? No worries! We have so many opportunities to get involved this weekend (and every weekend):_
---

_Saturday, 10am_

| [RSVP](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=2c64eea32a&e=400a181d5a "RSVP")

_All weekend, 10am, 12pm, & 2pm_

| We'll win this special election by out-organizing our opponents in every single corner of this district. That means knocking on doors, making calls, and being present in our communities every day. **[You can RSVP for all of our upcoming events here.](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1527debbca&e=400a181d5a) **I hope to see you this weekend!

In solidarity,

Morgan Hess
_Senior Advisor, Russo for Congress_

body:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: A Reminder Why the US Constitution is so Sublime – Update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/constitutionday?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=4ca84939d5&e=5703353baa)
---
| | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=59a55e57a1&e=5703353baa)
---
| | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=4113bfcb1f&e=5703353baa)
---
| Friend,

America is not an accident. Nor is this country just a piece of real estate between two oceans.

The United States is fundamentally a set of principles and ideals enshrined in the US Constitution.

Drafted by the Founders in that old courthouse in Philadelphia in the summer of 1787, the Constitution has not only endured. It helps explain why thirteen former British colonies rose to become the greatest Republic in history.

It was two hundred and thirty-four years ago, almost to the day, that the delegates at the Constitutional Convention concluded their work and put their names to the document.

As they returned home, I wonder how many of them realized quite what an extraordinary sublime and enduring document they had created?

---
|
---
|
[Aaron Rice writes about Constitution Day, and why it is worth celebrating.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=c70a6431ef&e=5703353baa)

Perhaps it is because I was not born in America that I have such a strong appreciation of what makes the United States and her Constitution so special.

The US Constitution is not only a remarkable achievement but an awesome inheritance. We owe it to previous generations to pass it intact to the next.

---
| |
---
Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
|
---
| | [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=cf8a500279&e=5703353baa)
---
The housing market is booming but government policies are preventing real estate flexibility!
|
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=f97ee08dcd&e=5703353baa)
---
Mississippi's defense industry has great potential for growth, but key public policy reforms are needed!
|
---
| |
---
"Economics policy and strong political leadership are not different worlds but rather two sides of the same coin. Political leaders must use wisdom to strike the right balance."

subject: It’s time for a broadband boost

body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35999234/306814362/1082413507?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWRjNGNjMy05ZjE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mvz0HkU3g1w7ZIlZrUTxUO078Z7IcdJznmecY3aUyLM=&emci=0bb5e0db-ca17-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=d1dc4cc3-9f18-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=10997957) Folks, Every single Nevadan, no matter their income or where they live, should have access to broadband internet. It’s as essential as any utility like electricity and water -- but people across the state don’t have equal access to this critical infrastructure. The **Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act,** which was just passed in the Senate, has the potential to bring $3 billion in funding to our state. _This is considered the most significant investment in American infrastructure since the interstate highway system was built._ This is our chance to expand broadband to every single Nevadan. But we need your help. [Can we count on you to add your name in support of this monumental investment in our infrastructure?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35999235/306814363/1082413507?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWRjNGNjMy05ZjE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mvz0HkU3g1w7ZIlZrUTxUO078Z7IcdJznmecY3aUyLM=&emci=0bb5e0db-ca17-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=d1dc4cc3-9f18-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=10997957) | | | [Expand Broadband Access! →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35999236/306814364/1082413507?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWRjNGNjMy05ZjE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mvz0HkU3g1w7ZIlZrUTxUO078Z7IcdJznmecY3aUyLM=&emci=0bb5e0db-ca17-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=d1dc4cc3-9f18-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=10997957)
---
The pandemic has highlighted how essential a strong, secure broadband system is. Students depend on it to attend online classes, adults rely on it to work from home, and families across the state use broadband to connect while staying safe.
However, not every Nevadan has had the opportunity to access a reliable broadband connection. Students missed critical learning days and people couldn’t log into work. __**In 2021, Nevadans shouldn’t be left behind because they lack broadband access.**__
Now’s our chance to guarantee a strong internet connection for hundreds of thousands of Nevadans. [Will you add your name in support of this landmark legislation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35999237/306814365/1082413507?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWRjNGNjMy05ZjE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mvz0HkU3g1w7ZIlZrUTxUO078Z7IcdJznmecY3aUyLM=&emci=0bb5e0db-ca17-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=d1dc4cc3-9f18-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=10997957)
| | [Add My Name! →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35999238/306814366/1082413507?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWRjNGNjMy05ZjE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mvz0HkU3g1w7ZIlZrUTxUO078Z7IcdJznmecY3aUyLM=&emci=0bb5e0db-ca17-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=d1dc4cc3-9f18-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=10997957)

Thank you,
Susie

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=875%2E3611125%2E4IsWLY ][IMG]

Folks,

I’ll be upfront: I’m a little worried we’ll fall short of our mid-month
fundraising goal right before our FEC fundraising report is due.

We need to reach out to voters, launch ads, and make our mark online to
win this race -- that takes resources.

If we miss our goal, Tim’s opponents and the national Republican groups
backing them will drown out our campaign message with more of their
dangerous rhetoric. We can’t afford to fall behind this early in the race.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/3230?t=1007&akid=875%2E3611125%2E4IsWLY ]Can you chip in $25 or whatever you can to help us catch up before
midnight?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/3230?t=1008&akid=875%2E3611125%2E4IsWLY ]Donate >>

I’m so proud to work for a candidate with a game plan to get Ohio working
again. Tim’s traveling and talking to folks all over the state -- not just
sticking to easy conversations in deep blue strongholds. He’s sharing his
vision for cutting workers in on the deal and listening to the issues that
matter most to Ohio families.

Our plan will work. We know it will. But the thing is, it costs money.

Remember: the balance of the Senate hangs on this race.

If we don’t expand our Senate majority, Republicans will continue to
filibuster our priorities, attack voting rights, and spread dangerous
misinformation. That’s why we can’t let up now. We’ve got much more work
to do.

Friend, the stakes of our race for governor just skyrocketed – and we have to take them extremely seriously.
**The Supreme Court's failure to intervene in Texas' horrific anti-abortion law is a disgrace – or, as Justice Sotomayor called it, "a breathtaking act of defiance" of the Constitution. And now, our extremist opponent is following in Doug Ducey's (R) footsteps by calling for a similar abortion ban _right here in Arizona._**
**I refuse to stand by while Arizona Republicans bring the worst of other states' extremism to our doorstep so they can strip millions of women of their rights. I'm running for governor to build a state that works for all people – but I can't hold GOP extremists back by myself. I need you with me, friend. [Can I count on you to donate $5 or more right now to help me flip Arizona blue, defeat GOP extremism and defend reproductive rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36001014/306821243/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk232-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWRkMTk0MS1hMzE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZkTtcbHnmqexrqqAfMxlLGMlz8t4j1ddVTwula8OeNU=)**

We elect leaders to protect and expand our rights – never to take them away. Yet when our extremist GOP opponent saw Texas leaders attacking reproductive rights and denying abortion access, she said, _"Well done, Texas. Arizona next."_
**Let me be clear: If we flip Arizona and I become governor, I will absolutely not be taking my cues from the draconian anti-choice "leaders" who just ripped away a woman's right to choose in Texas. I'll take them from Arizona voters – a majority of whom support Roe v. Wade. **
But Arizona is already 2022's top battleground, and POLITICO says the Republican establishment is piling up MILLIONS of dollars to defeat me – to defeat our movement. **I'm not waiting on some shady megadonors in the wings to power our campaign. I'm relying on YOU.[So please, will you rush as much as you can by midnight tonight to help me flip Arizona blue, protect abortion rights and defeat GOP extremism?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36001016/306821245/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk232-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWRkMTk0MS1hMzE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZkTtcbHnmqexrqqAfMxlLGMlz8t4j1ddVTwula8OeNU=)**

**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36001021/306821251/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk232-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWRkMTk0MS1hMzE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZkTtcbHnmqexrqqAfMxlLGMlz8t4j1ddVTwula8OeNU=) Thank you so much.

I'm not waiting on some shady megadonors in the wings to power our campaign. I'm relying on YOU.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for fighting with me, friend. – Marco Lopez Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:** Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, = Thank you so much. – Marco Lopez = | | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Marco Lopez for Governor PO Box 34672 Phoenix, AZ 85067 United States | | 2021 | Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez

clean_body: Kevin McCarthy is bullying, lying, and threatening people he disagrees with just to advance his political career. Exactly the type of behavior I teach my kids to avoid. | = I'm an educator, friend. That means it's my job to find the best way to explain complicated concepts to my kiddos. But when it comes to explaining the stakes in my race, it’s not that complicated: Kevin McCarthy is doing everything he can to protect the far-right and Trump, while real people who need help in our community are being left out to dry. I elaborate more in this "Kevin McCarthy 101" I put together. I hope you'll take a moment to watch: = | = In class, I talk a lot about leading by example. Kevin McCarthy is bullying, lying, and threatening people he disagrees with just to advance his political career -- exactly the type of behavior I tell my kids to avoid. It’s a shame that our district is represented by one of the most high-ranking politicians in the country, yet he behaves so poorly and hasn’t delivered much -- if anything -- to working people in our community. Kevin McCarthy doesn't deserve the Speaker's gavel, let alone to represent the Central Valley. subject: The REAL reason I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Earls for Georgia |
body:
I love this country, and I will do whatever I can to defend it against the radical Left... | |
---
[](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=aeca6fd3748045118679208c078d3022&_e=IOiHIZMZHO58DbFLPhHf5I3vJwl6xUhCSfYOaHp1ePz3ReR7BghAbZtXKeHzpyCxZxa3NCURMfR4AbBC5j4C-c6ltGnbty-D_Jlk1fGDixXmyWkduuqyZlN_WxgEdFfRLzqeCdHAE0zaOWCGau7hgpexGRZQ7o4bczpXqLpL-cvOlcJQ_TpimDeBy_tynCSbaL5zFgkIeb0zvbBIRnF14lzokmZF6ErjSUfw9mU4zzaKQ1Pqu5KUr_oDLUTajgLPXPADJGOyMkdqtS5CT8w6ZxUlvXxBLDVOzfbFu9Ll-xRoX8tP2iafKvpVSMcWFU6JIrsBj2hzZIZzCGs_lkzesEH4qiv5LzZeOC9IagEUN4X1DBX7w2_ADxRZMmQtg0WBuuAc8BCtCRT5PFEyM8VaIZ2LdSQRqPhp0scg3NDQypixMxkACXeXavxC4Ui2CjGZ8htnfjn0JVIin8XSB8eGQyv9G65rQ64OQn83DFWJQyI%3D)

Hey, Peter \- Harold here. I wanted to follow up on the email my team sent earlier this week.

I’m not going to lie to you, things are not going well in the radical Left’s America. That’s a big part of why I’m running for Congress - I want to fix all the problems Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and the Dems in Washington have created.

But that’s not the only reason, Peter.

Right now, Democrats aren’t just destroying our borders and our economy. They are also destroying the heart and soul of our country.

Dividing us. Canceling us. Forcing us to think how they think and feel how they feel.

It makes me furious, and I’m done putting up with it.

**I’m on a mission to preserve the things that make our country the greatest in the world so my kids grow up in an America that they can be proud of.**

If that sounds like something worth supporting to you, I encourage you to donate to my campaign and help me make it happen: _**[https://secure.winred.com/earls-for-georgia/action-2880745/](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=aeca6fd3748045118679208c078d3022&_e=IOiHIZMZHO58DbFLPhHf5I3vJwl6xUhCSfYOaHp1ePz3ReR7BghAbZtXKeHzpyCxZxa3NCURMfR4AbBC5j4C-c6ltGnbty-D_Jlk1fGDixXmyWkduuqyZlN_WxgEdFfRLzqeCdHAE0zaOWCGau7hgpexGRZQ7o4bczpXqLpL-cvOlcJQ_TpimDeBy_tynCSbaL5zFgkIeb0zvbBIRnF14lzokmZF6ErjSUfw9mU4zzaKQ1Pqu5KUr_oDLUTajgLPXPADJGOyMkdqtS5CT8w6Z2vqbhqmLZO3QHtVM5M9AnRjxHEG6M_6hhXgiQT0UhoNuDF47w2MBBOhxvheiSqo3J4nZa-JBMbLAhmeIB78qk5egYUz7Uz-fc_PPUJAddyyt6kTqTh0fWzC8A_aljKESEntyanE-PpRxgNtxJOAZW9ZrltdaDEZ7TmjNDv86hV1jXy7mCcNHM3juhOgaPj6LhS6U0ziV-es0lJKXmsREMs%3D)**_

I love this country, and I will do whatever I can to defend it against the radical Left. I hope you will join me in this fight, Peter.

_[**Click here to make a donation and help me preserve the heart and soul of America. >>>**](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=aeca6fd3748045118679208c078d3022&_e=IOiHIZMZHO58DbFLPhHf5I3vJwl6xUhCSfYOaHp1ePz3ReR7BghAbZtXKeHzpyCxZxa3NCURMfR4AbBC5j4C-c6ltGnbty-D_Jlk1fGDixXmyWkduuqyZlN_WxgEdFfRLzqeCdHAE0zaOWCGau7hgpexGRZQ7o4bczpXqLpL-cvOlcJQ_TpimDeBy_tynCSbaL5zFgkIeb0zvbBIRnF14lzokmZF6ErjSUfw9mU4zzaKQ1Pqu5KUr_oDLUTajgLPXPADJGOyMkdqtS5CT8w6Z0ic_ZbBsRQlP4388fxcjflnmYR76YVvOzIKs-hvwQX2DCi2UzvUMOsP9oePcLVqEv3dxMCFc88qkXfpjnTBVotyh_vmlfycNwpmhk7hqowRpYr0T6-nKhHWMl7w8KOu0MZT2kr5LlU89cT3WYHmTFwxt1CBG4iTJapHuHvfUUtBXWrHG3vlrkb6ch5MENsMmKq8y1OGx_BW0SIq4tVIlLM%3D)_

In freedom,

Harold

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: FWD - More than 125 House progressives, moderates, and frontline lawmakers support this. Do you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, we just wanted to make sure you saw Pramila’s email from last week. Negotiations are moving quickly on the Build Back Better Act — a transformative $3.5 trillion spending package that makes important investments in people and our communities. **Pramila’s fighting to include her Improving Medicare Coverage Act in the final package.** This bill would lower the Medicare eligibility age to 60, expanding care to at least 23 million more people. It is supported by a broad coalition of progressive, moderate, and frontline House Democrats facing tough reelection campaigns. **[Can you add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the Improving Medicare Coverage Act today?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/Improving_Medicare_Coverage_Act/?source=em20210918-644&t=1&akid=644%2E420207%2EJ4Bmd4)**_We need to show everyone how much support there is for expanding health care coverage to millions of more Americans:_ **[Add Your Name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/Improving_Medicare_Coverage_Act/?source=em20210918-644&t=2&akid=644%2E420207%2EJ4Bmd4)** In solidarity, Team Jayapal
---
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Pramila Jayapal
Date: Sun, Sep 12, 2021
Subject: More than 125 House progressives, moderates, and frontline lawmakers support this. Do you?
Peter, I’ve been fighting for Medicare for All for years — and you better believe that fight will continue until we guarantee health care to every person as a human right.
**But right now, we have a real opportunity to expand Medicare coverage by simply lowering the Medicare eligibility age to 60.** That would mean at least 23 million more Americans are finally able to get the care they need and deserve.
Good policy doesn’t have to be hard. We just have to do what's right. Lowering the Medicare eligibility age is popular, smart, and effective. [**If you agree, add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the Improving Medicare Coverage Act — let’s show everyone that the momentum is behind us to get this done.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/Improving_Medicare_Coverage_Act/?source=em20210918-644&t=3&akid=644%2E420207%2EJ4Bmd4)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/Improving_Medicare_Coverage_Act/?source=em20210918-644&t=4&akid=644%2E420207%2EJ4Bmd4)**
I feel like a broken record saying this sometimes, but what we’re asking for here isn’t unreasonable. **President Biden proposed lowering the eligibility age on the campaign trail, and a recent poll showed that Americans — Democrats and Republicans alike — support it too.**
The same is true inside Congress: More than 125 House progressives, moderates, and frontline lawmakers facing tough reelection fights support lowering the eligibility age because it’s good policy — but also because we want to show people across America that we’ve delivered for them.
Congress and President Biden should immediately deliver for the people by prioritizing the expansion and improvement of Medicare in the upcoming Build Back Better package. [**Add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the Improving Medicare Coverage Act, and join the fight to get health care to millions of additional Americans.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/Improving_Medicare_Coverage_Act/?source=em20210918-644&t=5&akid=644%2E420207%2EJ4Bmd4)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/Improving_Medicare_Coverage_Act/?source=em20210918-644&t=6&akid=644%2E420207%2EJ4Bmd4)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210918-644-footer&t=7&refcode2=644_420207_J4Bmd4&akid=644%2E420207%2EJ4Bmd4)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=8&akid=644%2E420207%2EJ4Bmd4)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=644%2E420207%2EJ4Bmd4)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Gwen Moore
subject: Fw: Still Appalled but Undaunted - But Democracy Will Prevail
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress |
body:
Trump-loving, right-wing sheep claim to be flocking to Washington again today to rally IN SUPPORT OF THE INSURRECTIONISTS! This is lunacy! This is not our democracy.

As I said on January 7th that bears repeating again today, it is our solemn duty to vote out hate and injustice, and against those who seek to perpetuate it. It is our duty to protect our democracy, and carry out the will of the American people, just as we did into the late night of January 6th and into the wee morning hours of January 7th.

Upholding your values in Congress and representing your voice is the most important servitude of my lifetime. You can always count on me to do my job as your Congresswoman. Always.

Donate using this secure link: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/domesticterrorism?refcode=091721

Together, #WeRepresent come hell or high water. And we always will.

-Gwen Moore
Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District
Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act
100% Pro-Choice
Stay Connected! Text "GWEN" to 313131 for campaign updates!

The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

Donate using this secure link: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/domesticterrorism?refcode=091721

Follow Us Online Here: https://www.gwenmooreforcongress.com/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/GwenMooreforCongress/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/gwen4congress
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/gwenmooreforcongress/

-----original message-----

From: Gwen Moore (gwen.moore@gwenmooreforcongress.com
Date: January 7, 2021
Subject: Appalled but Undaunted

At 1 PM ET yesterday, my fellow members of Congress and I began the ministerial process of certifying the Electoral College results. It’s a time-honored formality that Congress has performed for 130 years. I applaud my fellow Members, both Democrat and Republican, including Vice President Pence, who fulfilled their job of upholding the Constitution and the oath that they took to defend it.

In the face of an unprecedented attack on our democracy, we carried out the will of the people. I am proud to say that Congress confirmed Joseph R. Biden will be our next President and Kamala D. Harris will be our next Vice-President. At roughly 4 am EST, there was the formal recognition of the changing administrations.

However, what should have been a given formality was turned into an ugly and deadly act of domestic terrorism yesterday at the United States Capitol. And the actions of these violent looters at the Capitol were incited by Donald Trump in concert with numerous of his close, radical, right-wing Republican friends.

I am appalled by what transpired yesterday so I am calling for all involved to be held accountable, including the President. Our sacred institutions which have anchored this country for nearly three centuries are on the verge of crumbling if there is not accountability for the chaos of the last 4 years. Never again can we allow the likes of Donald Trump and those who espouse such beliefs to seek elected office. It is our solemn duty to ensure that we vote out hate and injustice and vote against those who perpetrate it. When their names appear on the ballot, we must vote.

It is not lost on me or anyone with a conscience, that Trump used the United States Military against US citizens when he was concerned about the defamation of racist monuments during the Black Lives Matter protests. Yet, when the United States Capitol, the core institution of our hallowed government, is under attack, he instructed the Defense Department to deny the request to deploy the DC National Guard. He and his ilk would rather burn our Republic to the ground than admit defeat at the will of the people.

January 20th will come and we will inaugurate a new President and Vice President and we will do so with a Democratic Majority in the House and Senate. We will build again and we will repair. And in the words of scripture, ....weeping may tarry for the night, but joy comes with the morning.

Representing you is an honor, and nothing will prevent me from doing my job as your voice in the House of Representatives.

Together, #WeRepresent

-Gwen Moore
A proud Black woman
Proudly standing up to Trump since day 1
Humbly serving Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District

Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District
Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act
100% Pro-Choice

It’s a time-honored formality that Congress has performed for 130 years. I applaud my fellow Members, both Democrat and Republican, including Vice President Pence, who fulfilled their job of upholding the Constitution and the oath that they took to defend it. In the face of an unprecedented attack on our democracy, we carried out the will of the people. I am proud to say that Congress confirmed Joseph R. Biden will be our next President and Kamala D. Harris will be our next Vice-President. At roughly 4 am EST, there was the formal recognition of the changing administrations. However, what should have been a given formality was turned into an ugly and deadly act of domestic terrorism yesterday at the United States Capitol. And the actions of these violent looters at the Capitol were incited by Donald Trump in concert with numerous of his close, radical, right-wing Republican friends. I am appalled by what transpired yesterday so I am calling for all involved to be held accountable, including the President. Our sacred institutions which have anchored this country for nearly three centuries are on the verge of crumbling if there is not accountability for the chaos of the last 4 years. Never again can we allow the likes of Donald Trump and those who espouse such beliefs to seek elected office. It is our solemn duty to ensure that we vote out hate and injustice and vote against those who perpetrate it. When their names appear on the ballot, we must vote. It is not lost on me or anyone with a conscience, that Trump used the United States Military against US citizens when he was concerned about the defamation of racist monuments during the Black Lives Matter protests. Yet, when the United States Capitol, the core institution of our hallowed government, is under attack, he instructed the Defense Department to deny the request to deploy the DC National Guard. He and his ilk would rather burn our Republic to the ground than admit defeat at the will of the people. January 20th will come and we will inaugurate a new President and Vice President and we will do so with a Democratic Majority in the House and Senate. We will build again and we will repair. And in the words of scripture, ....weeping may tarry for the night, but joy comes with the morning. Representing you is an honor, and nothing will prevent me from doing my job as your voice in the House of Representatives. Together, #WeRepresent -Gwen Moore A proud Black woman Proudly standing up to Trump since day 1 Humbly serving Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice Stay Connected! Text "GWEN" to 313131 for campaign updates! Donate using this secure link: The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92. name: Josh Mandel
subject: They HATE America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Josh A joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Citizens for Josh Mandel, Inc
body:
Peter, The Democrats will do whatever it takes to brainwash the next generation of Americans. Their efforts to push Critical Race Theory in our schools is nothing more than an attempt to create further division in our great nation, and teach our nation’s youth to **HATE** America. This is unacceptable, Peter. That’s why I am calling on **ALL** Patriots to stand with me against Critical Race Theory. body:
We must not dismiss extremism because when it’s armed, it can have deadly consequences.
#

**The right-wing extremist rally is happening in DC TODAY!**
[**Quickly, rush your contribution to Giffords NOW to demonstrate that you want Congress to take action on violent extremism and gun violence.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210918-1-15&t=1&refcode2=875_3935704_GMuaUd&akid=875%2E3935704%2EGMuaUd)

* * *
**Today, right-wing extremists are gathering for a rally in Washington, DC in support of the rioters convicted of storming our Capitol on January 6th.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210918-1-15&t=3&refcode2=875_3935704_GMuaUd&akid=875%2E3935704%2EGMuaUd)
No matter what happens today, the threat of extremism is very real. We know that domestic terrorists are plotting together online, spreading conspiracy theories, and building arsenals. In the past few weeks, we’ve seen one man make bomb threats in front of the Supreme Court, and another casing the DNC with a machete and bayonet.
**We must not dismiss extremism because when it’s armed, it can have deadly consequences. We must take extremism seriously and close loopholes in our gun laws to keep firearms out of the hands of people who shouldn’t have them.**
[**If you agree, rush a contribution to Giffords before the right-wing rally starts today. Let’s show everyone watching that Americans want Congress to ACT to prevent more violent extremism and keep guns out of the hands of domestic terrorists. While our democracy thankfully withstood the attack on January 6th, very real threats to it and the potential for violence remain.
Voter intimidation. Threats to election officials. Brandishing weapons in state capitals. Attacking police at the U.S. Capitol... Violent extremism is a growing threat to our democracy, and it’s on Congress to disarm it.

You and I can no longer sit on the sidelines and watch our country be destroyed by woke Leftists that hate America. We have to fight for the values that make our country great.
I'm proud to be an American and stand up for liberty, free speech, the Second Amendment, the pro-life movement, and the Constitution.
[I am releasing a new TV ad to share my message with Ohio voters. Fellow American,

As I watch the ever growing Border Crisis continue to unfold, I cannot help but think if Joe Biden has any sort of regard for the safety and protection of the American people.

**Currently,** there are thousands of migrants huddled under a bridge in South Texas, waiting to get further into our country.

CNN, MSNBC, the New York Times, and the Washington Post won’t know what to do with themselves... and it will be glorious! All the phony narratives they’ve run since 2015, when Donald J. Trump first announced his campaign for President, will be exposed for the world to see!!

AOC and her Squad comrades will be relegated to the back bench of Congress, where they can stew about the results, and figure out a new way to resurrect their grand schemes for American socialism. Or, maybe how to apply for dual citizenship in Venezuela.

clean_body: I'm the working mom that's going to take down Pelosi This display proves once again that Democrats will never put Americans FIRST. They want to lock you down again while they party together through the night. They use their status and impalpable power to do as they please while forcing everyday citizens to live under their rules. | Fellow Conservative, I want you to take a moment to imagine Nancy Pelosi’s worst nightmare: A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, from a swing state like Nevada, defeats a little-known Democrat with no accomplishments to speak of other than voting with Pelosi 99% of the time. This hard-fought victory, in Nevada’s 3rd Congressional District, is the race that finally pries the Speaker’s Gavel from Pelosi’s clenched fist, demoting her to minority leader or better yet – straight into retirement. - Just as important, with Republican control of the U.S. House of Representatives, we can now stop President Joe Biden’s radical, socialist agenda dead in its tracks. CNN, MSNBC, the New York Times, and the Washington Post won’t know what to do with themselves... and it will be glorious! All the phony narratives they’ve run since 2015, when Donald J. Trump first announced his campaign for President, will be exposed for the world to see!! AOC and her Squad comrades will be relegated to the back bench of Congress, where they can stew about the results, and figure out a new way to resurrect their grand schemes for American socialism. Or, maybe how to apply for dual citizenship in Venezuela. My name is April Becker, and in addition to running for Congress in Nevada’s 3rd District, I truly am Nancy Pelosi’s worst nightmare.But it’s not why you might think. Right now, Speaker Pelosi is focused on two things: advancing her party’s radical socialist agenda, and protecting her most vocal and vulnerable Democrat colleagues to defend her shrinking majority. I’m not even on her radar.Nor do I want to be. I’m a working mom with three children. I worked to pay my own way through college, and then law school. I’m a practicing attorney who donates her time fighting for the underdog and taking on tough cases. I’m the type of person who outworks everyone in the room and exceeds expectations. I’m for balanced budgets, lower taxes, less spending, strong borders, and more freedom. I believe the cancer of “cancel culture” is one of the greatest challenges we face, and I’m appalled at how quickly the liberals are trying to erase history. Abraham Lincoln isn’t even safe! I could take another ten emails to tell you why I’m running for Congress, and the issues I care about the most, but I’m sure I’d just be preaching to the choir. | Today, Greater Georgia hosted a Day of Action in Cherokee County as part of the [Red Belt Blitz](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_tcwlvv51QptYB_y4aLPgPkT-aLY57gWcnigyke3zGgUhRNUFZML5iBcHIdq4pYNSVsDMBHYBjIKLoYepAcpqZ_Zseo0-2f8CAQQzrMrBQLci3E4KGq1vxkbyAVapC-tX27CcK37C1QmEWpWx8_lKKXthKvSN_cUzN4nCSlLIFHpBwcaId4d-KYj3TF5gp4sQJUqgRPxnkWKuUIOzGvv_5iL3g1fiV51u4LQwmMNnlPLn61VzJ2TwZbgP9WmiDKfZZ5zEX2p_C2pDITQr4Bs1Q==&c=xoLvUVdcBpUlbrHvudxdlc_aU9CyNAHCerQIJ8KpbcA47-O48v7bmw==&ch=2m7gDmuKtDwBFzxw0NOTHs1_ooQOSna8KCK9JoHxix6BCNyrq5aVeQ==) to register and engage voters. Volunteers were joined by Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler and then deployed into local neighborhoods to knock doors.
This event was the first in Greater Georgia's [push](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_tcwlvv51QptYB_y4aLPgPkT-aLY57gWcnigyke3zGgUhRNUFZML5iBcHIdq4pYNUHzuD-3PTy4OypUY0EuaEj6jvl9lbCmJcWoJK-hfejUZHF5p-i7SSPYVojK2XwaA2JECugI5P5Ipzl1t0cOfbIct2FC41V6yrtVYXBh41NDFNjaT1qT5hwrtBhfJNsoVhH8w0g4PneSIzX_CMzVLFpw6p9GhnLmDXPPq2J7qaBLv-ApTSnMMl2m2BCaMhm8Jojll6DVClrqrIGfP4CGTJwEonSkd4vSnNMkmw2Uxiwc=&c=xoLvUVdcBpUlbrHvudxdlc_aU9CyNAHCerQIJ8KpbcA47-O48v7bmw==&ch=2m7gDmuKtDwBFzxw0NOTHs1_ooQOSna8KCK9JoHxix6BCNyrq5aVeQ==) to connect with 100,000 voters in five "Red Belt" counties in North Georgia - Cherokee, Hall, Forsyth, Bartow, and Floyd.
