| INTERNSHIP PROGRAM
Greater Georgia has officially launched an [internship program](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_tcwlvv51QptYB_y4aLPgPkT-aLY57gWcnigyke3zGgUhRNUFZML5nXM2XppmvpWkdkccgFzyn7d1hng5X8bK0EsWR0YeqNCCSTlp_-Inx3Ni6GaYCGsriAvKJbWjVGlh10P78puv_cA79yeFcnzyQrYdE883Fkyd6gRcO5Rfto=&c=xoLvUVdcBpUlbrHvudxdlc_aU9CyNAHCerQIJ8KpbcA47-O48v7bmw==&ch=2m7gDmuKtDwBFzxw0NOTHs1_ooQOSna8KCK9JoHxix6BCNyrq5aVeQ==)! We are recruiting interns to assist with voter registration and engagement. This opportunity will be great to learn the ropes of political organizing, including how to get out the vote, how to engage with voters in a variety of communities, and more. Possible areas of compensation include class credit, milage reimbursement, and cash incentives based on goal-oriented progress.
If you or someone you know is interested, please contact Outreach Coordinator Terry Fye at terry@greatergeorgia.com with questions or to submit a completed application.
The full internship application can be found [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_tcwlvv51QptYB_y4aLPgPkT-aLY57gWcnigyke3zGgUhRNUFZML5nXM2XppmvpWegszBJAUUvAoMSsVkg73So3URSlO--v59m5a8vGu-BNkyLnoqaP0R-S-NdRSmmyH-XyydwMhZTRL9iCpIeM9DDgxXJqSpd9mXT37Fji3WHfM-GMnRkkobAahRr8fLNYq6AJBA1sJco13x8wU0PUsQayJzTcDGDS82VC-AegZRag=&c=xoLvUVdcBpUlbrHvudxdlc_aU9CyNAHCerQIJ8KpbcA47-O48v7bmw==&ch=2m7gDmuKtDwBFzxw0NOTHs1_ooQOSna8KCK9JoHxix6BCNyrq5aVeQ==).

Fellow Conservative,

You know how serious the situation has become. Nancy Pelosi's Democrat majority is passing trillions in new spending for President Joe Biden's signature, and threatening disastrous policies like the _"Green New Deal."_

I have been fighting back every single day in Washington against the Democrats' progressive socialist agenda, _and you know who has been right beside me?_ **Congresswoman Debbie Lesko.**

**It's never been more important to have tough, smart, conservative Republicans like Arizona's Debbie Lesko in Congress representing our Party and fighting for our values -** **[and that's why I'm contacting you today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6a8e882d0f024fe9bf9f222fa767fe53&_e=OVQ5ldWlU2_qZnFgE09upiM9Wf2ukdgshnv8m4K9hP1vzkWI3dTCkfAGJ5VYx-WCh5LwRrHmThTAWIT-inqBSpCGSZzrJUALUlB5tkQ_UKaAX2FSBtSlNNJEQKijDQAol2Sf7rZontlK2dBEFn5HM6JBg9yVD1Y8hoi1Zsb3ZH9LPy9_QIdx_Vfv29BJKxQSIprug4MPRbXbquM3_LKBuMR0l0Mzrm38uMlMcLmCQ-Ogh99J6w0ZsChpAG0JuLxDIMLh3HJ5QWJy5H92o-1qgOppQ7TTBj_7H0NKnBuAcR8JM3wBN1gFD_3LD1UtZ4lJnsxkwyC7oSaMzAFoBJXuZVmp2_dW4GetbHQzoL8VdUHVUeBngifZULeyvW0osLX1uZZ48HV8HoxqYB7KGGy5uaC3yiYHKcDpXPWUDRZHbAGOv5ivo1sBKcen_06AoBrQ)**

Hello Friends,

Our country is desperate for leadership. Desperate.

The President of the United States is not even mentally fit for office, yet he is the mouthpiece for progressive policy promoted by an invisible group of power hungry advisors.

The Speaker of the House, Nancy Pelosi, represents the most devastated district in the nation. Her district has been overrun with crime, drugs, mental illness and homelessness.

Even our own representative from the 3rd district is silent about the devastating consequences of this administration. She continues to fail to be a voice of opposition against the destructive policies that are destroying families, closing businesses and wounding our most precious resource...our children.

We can no longer sit back and allow this to continue. We need to send a qualified, fearless leader to Congress to represent this district and the millions around the nation who desire a sincere and tireless leader.

I am ready to be your voice and to be the representative that shares your values and will be able to articulate your concerns to the highest branch of government.

But I can't do this alone. The powers that be in good ole Washington DC are trying to silence my voice.

I need you to get off the bench and step into battle with me.

Maximum donation is $2900 for the primary election and $2900 for the general election. How much can you give?

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | Hello Friends, Our country is desperate for leadership. Desperate. The President of the United States is not even mentally fit for office, yet he is the mouthpiece for progressive policy promoted by an invisible group of power hungry advisors. The Speaker of the House, Nancy Pelosi, represents the most devastated district in the nation. Her district has been overrun with crime, drugs, mental illness and homelessness. Even our own representative from the 3rd district is silent about the devastating consequences of this administration. She continues to fail to be a voice of opposition against the destructive policies that are destroying families, closing businesses and wounding our most precious resource...our children. We can no longer sit back and allow this to continue. We need to send a qualified, fearless leader to Congress to represent this district and the millions around the nation who desire a sincere and tireless leader. I am ready to be your voice and to be the representative that shares your values and will be able to articulate your concerns to the highest branch of government. But I can't do this alone. The powers that be in good ole Washington DC are trying to silence my voice. I need you to get off the bench and step into battle with me. Maximum donation is $2900 for the primary election and $2900 for the general election. How much can you give? | | | == | | | == | | | == | Prayerfully consider giving once or monthly. Are you in this to win this, too? I am. | | | | | Upcoming Events | | | ---|--- | September 22 - Washington State Republican Party Annual Dinner October 6 - Clark County Freedom Rally with Rick Green - Church on the Rock at 7:00pm October 7 - Lewis County Freedom Rally with Rick Green - The Mason Jar at 7:00pm October 23 & 24 - Private Event November 6 - Harvest with Heidi | | | | == | America's Town Hall I'm honored to have guest Dustin Stephan, 14+ year veteran of the Washington State Patrol, on podcast today. A lawsuit was recently filed in Walla Walla County and Dustin Stephan is one of the people listed on this complaint. We are experiencing an unprecedented overreach -- based on the emergency orders that were granted by the legislator to Governor Inslee -- that is violating our constitutional rights. Join us for this episode of America's Town Hall with Heidi St. John. | | == | | == | | | | | == | == == | | | | | Friends of Heidi St. John for Congress | PO Box 2828, Battle Ground, WA 98604 | | Sent by mailto:info@heidistjohnforcongress.com powered by

name: Team Kaptur
subject: We need Marcy on the frontlines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress
body:
An outspoken advocate for green jobs and sustainability, Marcy is leading the charge against climate change. |
Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux5rTXePTq_zAzKi5TP0ML36covBuVrFwI2fCl1PhwHkKTPUmwSxcBX6qjlhCY5-9haV5e9P4Yqd8FszmJkF2H5hnpGZ3PwKOHOhe-D5d31L-D5H0vARrNgvdsYqEMsYs5SoOEu7LK8Jbf2PU1Ch9NxN7oXyrcNFHlfm2_sQ59sV7EA2LhrCt2U_hjxNAMvnBJhSKMCEmorXgH6a0P2hy3T55bjTAlxCKBem9xiPMr6nRDthn6q_Jwkzsxgj71_h_kQvRrXEYW-px6Z_vLsG0N5QKd1inh-rJekeGT09RcWlI57PJmTxg-MZX4FzXqcqjAS8Owfnd0x1YMROqkE9D8srJTOwyE4Xx1RPZIjufdn72/3ff/2z6qza-TQ2aAXFRW5hfxxg/h0/zstQxZiYgFnxbDZ15jhryVPLyQpDmNDht4yge-Yv33Q)

| | Team,

Rep. Marcy Kaptur has been a fierce defender of our environment. She was among the first members of Congress to propose the idea of a climate corps program _more than a decade ago._

It’s long past time that we **prioritize initiatives that reduce carbon emissions and protect underserved communities in Ohio and across the country.**

Marcy Kaptur is making a strong case for a Civilian Climate Corps that **puts people to work by building parks, paving roads, and planting trees.** We saw in FDR’s New Deal some of the great work that can come from public works programs. **It’s time to put the ingenuity and compassion of the American people to work in the fight against climate change.**

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: We are writing to ask if you’d be willing to take a short, 1-minute survey to let us know how confident you are that Mark is going to win re-election. This feedback is important.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We are writing today with a simple, but important question: How confident are you that Mark is going to win re-election?
#

Friends —
We are writing today with a simple, but important question:
How confident are you that Mark is going to win re-election?
[**Use this link to let us know your answer.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/confidence_survey?source=em210918-1-15&refcode2=1352.6688874.z_Bzsq&t=1&akid=1352%2E6688874%2Ez_Bzsq)
Here’s why we ask:
Participation is down a bit right now. Our guess is that people think because Mark won once — in a state Joe Biden won — it should be easy for him to win again.
But the truth is, this election will be even more difficult than last year.
So we want to know:
[**Please take our short, 1-minute survey and let us know how confident you are that Mark is going to win re-election next November.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/confidence_survey?source=em210918-1-15&refcode2=1352.6688874.z_Bzsq&t=2&akid=1352%2E6688874%2Ez_Bzsq)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/confidence_survey?source=em210918-1-15&refcode2=1352.6688874.z_Bzsq&t=3&akid=1352%2E6688874%2Ez_Bzsq)**
Thanks. This feedback is important.
— Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=1352%2E6688874%2Ez_Bzsq).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Team Schmidt
subject: New additions to the team!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
More leaders around Kansas are endorsing Derek to be our next governor, and we thought you may want to see the latest to be added to the list. Friend, **More leaders around Kansas are endorsing Derek to be our next governor, and we thought you may want to see the latest to be added to the list. ** With so much momentum building up to elect a Republican governor next fall, we have one simple question for you: [**Are YOU on Team Schmidt? If so, let us know immediately! **](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=63da672d5adc488abd57d260262ba32c&_e=37_vre-2HUQ_Y-oFvd8q3i1C7asL3-DlI-7A10H09Tvn1y_e1OzdKpgC-Ye-aYVTq2AUmt3c-ctkb1wr9cdd3tUiqi9FdoQBvdiDqP522igWweGe9M2h6HhJc4VsO5EH-cHCPv_6YeSuwGpHIKcXnIe4opq8h7lARLaViQStkF5ymYrhRA-Ng43Vtvw-1Fw-E8HT_1dhpvKuZmAuy_5u3LKnWdLwrJPIFJ8w840QWI0yyD-TN8-ao0F_0aC8GBJmqR005a2pAKmBXAaXfKd0aWQRjJzwNKMEpy1_v1OWT-DSzcSSlXwKNI7it31oousdK_CHfKvV4s4WN7cIVBogp2sUI5_4sgMAgMmqeHnfWzoIhJRG2H8QTzlmQipV3KI-AsWg1MTEWyD62bbLu_ie7p_-r1c_j1FglJg2BQIAycEwxkI6Ps-30f0ENNybFY-MjrAjZkHYzirq_ymj2-WT1w%3D%3D) [**WIN WITH DEREK SCHMIDT**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=63da672d5adc488abd57d260262ba32c&_e=37_vre-2HUQ_Y-oFvd8q3i1C7asL3-DlI-7A10H09Tvn1y_e1OzdKpgC-Ye-aYVTq2AUmt3c-ctkb1wr9cdd3tUiqi9FdoQBvdiDqP522igWweGe9M2h6HhJc4VsO5EH-cHCPv_6YeSuwGpHIKcXnIe4opq8h7lARLaViQStkF5ymYrhRA-Ng43Vtvw-1Fw-E8HT_1dhpvKuZmAuy_5u3LKnWdLwrJPIFJ8w840QWI2Wg-pPMCWvTaBzDM3qEAzq1iztgZbTdXC7rtVXu2xbcOa5dojIpkGgt0wgrLnCOepT19bicLkfwtvz7fLW2wqQmv0k3KXtuVW094XGSucvYeHvXFeB5RPgw3rfQV1peR1PHqC_kYJj7RfXxIshz6pBsZc0TfWd9scOhXPy3SxiwDRTaFDU6YuB6dv75-pxQKpjMspHiz6Ka8TcyUbnLRHIS-8aC0neaD-MzY7AmZueBw%3D%3D) Check out a few of this past week’s endorsements and what they have to say about Derek: _“It became evident early last year that Kansas needs a real Leader in Topeka. Derek Schmidt stepped up in a big way to protect our freedoms and it was then he earned my endorsement. It is past time for Kansas to be led by a Governor who respects Kansas Conservative values and is willing to stand up to the current Federal administration. It is truly my pleasure to endorse Derek Schmidt for Governor.”_ **_–Stephen Owens, Kansas State Representative_** _“I am thrilled to endorse Derek Schmidt for Governor. He has shown the ability to lead Kansas with strength and determination focused on our future. Derek understands the values we hold dear, has the compassion to serve others, and has the knowledge and integrity needed to lead during challenging times.”_ **_–Megan Lynn, Kansas State Representative _** _"__I've worked closely with Derek Schmidt on important issues in the Judiciary Committee and have always found him to be an excellent listener and someone who is thoughtful and intelligent. He is a strong leader and the right person to be our next Governor of Kansas...”_ **_–Brad Ralph, Kansas State Representative_** Take a look at the rest of our new endorsements from this week:
* Rep. Eric Smith
* Rep. Leo Delperdang
* Rep. Steve Huebert
* Rep. Adam Thomas
* Rep. Tim Johnson
* Rep. Shannon Francis
* Rep. Barbara Wasinger

clean_body: More leaders around Kansas are endorsing Derek to be our next governor, and we thought you may want to see the latest to be added to the list. Friend, More leaders around Kansas are endorsing Derek to be our next governor, and we thought you may want to see the latest to be added to the list. With so much momentum building up to elect a Republican governor next fall, we have one simple question for you: Check out a few of this past week’s endorsements and what they have to say about Derek: “It became evident early last year that Kansas needs a real Leader in Topeka. Derek Schmidt stepped up in a big way to protect our freedoms and it was then he earned my endorsement. It is past time for Kansas to be led by a Governor who respects Kansas Conservative values and is willing to stand up to the current Federal administration. It is truly my pleasure to endorse Derek Schmidt for Governor.” –Stephen Owens, Kansas State Representative “I am thrilled to endorse Derek Schmidt for Governor. He has shown the ability to lead Kansas with strength and determination focused on our future. Derek understands the values we hold dear, has the compassion to serve others, and has the knowledge and integrity needed to lead during challenging times.” –Megan Lynn, Kansas State Representative "I've worked closely with Derek Schmidt on important issues in the Judiciary Committee and have always found him to be an excellent listener and someone who is thoughtful and intelligent. He is a strong leader and the right person to be our next Governor of Kansas...” –Brad Ralph, Kansas State Representative Take a look at the rest of our new endorsements from this week: Rep. Eric Smith Rep. Leo Delperdang Rep. Steve Huebert Rep. Adam Thomas Rep. Tim Johnson Rep. Shannon Francis Rep. Barbara Wasinger ** Thanks, Team Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I didn’t want to email you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hello, I’d prefer not to email asking for money for my reelection campaign, but our big FEC deadline is right around the corner, and our fundraising is falling behind. Winning in a swing state like New Hampshire is both hard and expensive. I only won my last race by 1,017 votes, and Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and Mike Pence are already rallying Republicans here for the next election. **The money we raise now is vital for pushing back against the misleading attacks the GOP is already lobbing our way.** **[I wouldn’t ask if this wasn’t important: Please donate $5 or as much as you can to help protect New Hampshire’s vulnerable Senate seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36009105/306848506/-149339129?refcode=e20210918_mwh-scotus&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzc0N2MwNy1jNDE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RhxXDfYD64azgZlKLguzAUSbE7rfIkBjGwyqCt17KyY=)** It’s not just Senate control on the line. **The future of the Supreme Court is at stake too.** Mitch McConnell has promised that if Republicans take back the Senate majority, he’ll refuse to consider any of President Biden’s Supreme Court nominees. With Donald Trump’s three ultra-conservative justices already skewing the balance of the Court, that’s not a chance we can afford to take. **[I’m counting on your help, please. Rush $5 or whatever you can right now to help win in New Hampshire, save the Senate majority, and protect the future of the Supreme Court.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36009106/306848507/-149339129?refcode=e20210918_mwh-scotus&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzc0N2MwNy1jNDE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RhxXDfYD64azgZlKLguzAUSbE7rfIkBjGwyqCt17KyY=)** Thank you very much. With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36009107/306848508/-149339129?refcode=e20210918_mwh-scotus&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzc0N2MwNy1jNDE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RhxXDfYD64azgZlKLguzAUSbE7rfIkBjGwyqCt17KyY=)

clean_body: | | | Hello, I’d prefer not to email asking for money for my reelection campaign, but our big FEC deadline is right around the corner, and our fundraising is falling behind. Winning in a swing state like New Hampshire is both hard and expensive. I only won my last race by 1,017 votes, and Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and Mike Pence are already rallying Republicans here for the next election. The money we raise now is vital for pushing back against the misleading attacks the GOP is already lobbing our way. = It’s not just Senate control on the line. The future of the Supreme Court is at stake too. Mitch McConnell has promised that if Republicans take back the Senate majority, he’ll refuse to consider any of President Biden’s Supreme Court nominees. With Donald Trump’s three ultra-conservative justices already skewing the balance of the Court, that’s not a chance we can afford to take. = Thank you very much. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:
| | | **[Amy Klobuchar just gave a STUNNING alert about the future of our democracy in the wake of SHOCKING Republican attacks on our right to vote. So we're calling on 4,000 grassroots Democrats to rise up and answer her urgent call by SAVING our House Majority and defeating anti-democracy House Republicans. Can we count on you and your immediate $3 to elect pro-voting rights House Democrats?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-)**

You need to see this straight away.

**FIRST:**

After our HISTORIC Democratic victories in 2020, Republicans across the country launched _**400+**_ bills to suppress our sacred right to vote.

**THEN:**

Senator Amy Klobuchar JUMPED into action and delivered a DIRE warning about what's at stake at this critical moment:

[](https://links.e.dccc.)

**NOW: **

****[We have no choice but to heed Amy's DIRE warning, DEFEAT these anti-voting rights House Republicans, and PROTECT our critical House Majority. Can you join Amy in this fight by chipping in $3 to elect House Democrats who will work to defend our voting rights?](https://links.e.dccc.)** **
| [MAJORITY DEFENDER CONTRIBUTION: **PENDING**
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.)

---

Amy is absolutely right: **The stakes are too high to sit on the sidelines.**

And right now, Trump and his anti-democracy Republicans are counting on supporters like you to pack up and go home.

As Democrats, we MUST show them that we're not going down without a fight -- _and that our pro-democracy House Majority is ready to take them on. _

**[But we can't protect our democracy without your help. So please: Can we count on your $3 to help elect pro-voting rights House Democrats all across the country?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/-YK-CNqg9dC~)**

Team Caraveo

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Dr. Yadira Caraveo** <[info@caraveoforcongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36010444/306852333/1430529782?refcode=em_YC_FR_MM3kenbuckfwd_091821_op_a_sl1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDM4NjgwYi1jYzE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vpmJEZBt5xsoA-VVI8a5cwceuDjkTyCLEm1EEl_Kmug=)>

Subject: This is what hate looks like.
To: Peter Willis <[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36010445/306852334/1430529782?refcode=em_YC_FR_MM3kenbuckfwd_091821_op_a_sl2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDM4NjgwYi1jYzE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vpmJEZBt5xsoA-VVI8a5cwceuDjkTyCLEm1EEl_Kmug=)>

Peter —

Colorado’s redistricting committee just released new maps, and if they hold my opponent will be **extremist GOP Rep. Ken Buck.**

**[Short on time? Rush a contribution of $25 or what you can now to help me take on extremist Republicans like Ken Buck >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36010446/306852335/1430529782?refcode=em_YC_FR_MM3kenbuckfwd_091821_op_a_l2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDM4NjgwYi1jYzE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vpmJEZBt5xsoA-VVI8a5cwceuDjkTyCLEm1EEl_Kmug=)**

Who is Ken Buck?
* Anti-vaccine
* Anti-abortion extremist who wants to ban abortion even in the case of rape or incest
* Anti-birth control: fought to ban common forms of birth control
* Told a rape victim she had "buyer's remorse" and refused to prosecute her case
* Climate change denier
* Compared homosexuality to a disease
* Claims Social Security is unconstitutional

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36010447/306852336/1430529782?refcode=em_YC_FR_MM3kenbuckfwd_091821_op_a_img&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDM4NjgwYi1jYzE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vpmJEZBt5xsoA-VVI8a5cwceuDjkTyCLEm1EEl_Kmug=) And he thinks that this is an appropriate shirt to wear at a “BBQ & Guns” GOP campaign event. Lauren Boebert was also there, of course.

Listen, Peter — these extreme ideas have no place in Congress. **But they are taking over the Republican party.**

We see it in Texas, where the new abortion ban not only effectively outlaws the procedure in the state — it places a $10,000 bounty that encourages vigilantes to report ANYONE who “helps” a woman get an abortion. **This is downright dystopian. name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: I’m sorry to bother you, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Our fundraising has completely stalled out over the last couple days and I need your help so we can kick it into high gear -- especially now that Virginians are already voting.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36011589/306854975/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzNlMWIwZC1kMjE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pRq2rcr5QGHUBqFXI1LJj_8d16kkSwrChXWjaisFdG8=&emci=dabb0b4a-0118-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=1c3e1b0d-d218-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, I’m sorry to bother you on a Saturday, but it’s important. Early voting is already underway in Virginia, and **_a recent poll shows my Trump-backed opponent Glenn Youngkin ahead by 2 points._** It’s the first poll he’s led all campaign and it’s coming at an awful time. Our fundraising has completely stalled out over the last couple days and I need your help so we can kick it into high gear -- especially now that Virginians are already voting. **_[Will you split a contribution between Mark Warner and my campaign? Your contribution goes directly toward our efforts to turn out voters, defend Virginia’s progress, and stop Donald Trump.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36011590/306854976/-116611833?refcode=mw_em_210918_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzNlMWIwZC1kMjE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pRq2rcr5QGHUBqFXI1LJj_8d16kkSwrChXWjaisFdG8=)_** If you’re like me, you’re getting a lot of fundraising emails right now. I don’t doubt the urgency of those races, but let me tell you why no race is more important than Virginia in 2021. For the last decade, Virginia Democrats have led the nation by delivering victory after victory for working families. Right now all of that progress is under attack. If my opponent Glenn Youngkin becomes Virginia’s governor, he’ll roll back every inch we fought so hard for. Moreover, Donald Trump has endorsed Youngkin three separate times. If Youngkin wins, Trump’s 2024 presidential run will get a huge momentum boost heading into 2022. **_[So I’m asking -- will you split anything you can right now between me and Mark Warner to help us deliver a huge victory for Democrats this November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36011591/306854977/-116611833?refcode=mw_em_210918_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzNlMWIwZC1kMjE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pRq2rcr5QGHUBqFXI1LJj_8d16kkSwrChXWjaisFdG8=)_** Thanks for your time, Terry McAuliffe **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36011592/306854978/-116611833?refcode=mw_em_210918_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzNlMWIwZC1kMjE4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pRq2rcr5QGHUBqFXI1LJj_8d16kkSwrChXWjaisFdG8=)**

body:
I'll never forget what it felt like to play for the Georgia Bulldogs on the historic Dooley Field at Sanford Stadium, in front of 90,000 screaming fan |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d17c373a04aa45fc94faa5b407ff94c3&_e=RfPM8Li3wjcZM7z3WXAD_p-0njxEn7Cqg00dwV1fNKu9CIQI8HjhIRbC4HA2mT4bd3FfIRLCP42HwW6M6JsqBovkQcntaTrJk2gtSSJ9AaeFNTVObiSxwjLywzMY71ojW_xtGA5Fe0qYvvAFQfXgvif4zm3grSA0NOrKs6ECYoGHHCgDcDKFDwv8D6TCWAaRb2_nOdKwxzYcBnBvb0YnHvHEmeyibag3ph5itEyYZ8ZFspiVtPF95g3JWsK-FWHobwRg538jZcaLj_-dvWqiPSrKEiV69fw2Qx3DbsR3c1YcInHfhBJwEnd9Vfn-Rm37uH5tPFW6KruXXh6mM_3Xof7k-M8sdEr7sHt89uaGSuNFRuoZ_2ItAj6xvOWh-ksD8vrvwv_2xBVaW9U_K5_WQoAwLCX76iurGorFwK-IPyYSzKI-cfhHKPw_vAmCxiHhEe3mdoyFE8l-z0TVOcdkzagZDv3gyk_r3uxcTjyiEuBIMf9HmsmcVQokteka3Vr4)

Fellow Conservative,

Saturdays during football season are special in college towns across the country. _However, there is nothing quite like Saturdays in Athens, Georgia, when the Bulldogs are playing - especially being a Bulldog on a Saturday night after a Georgia win. _

clean_body: | | | = | | Derek, we’ve got a big problem in the Virginia Governor’s race. Right now, Trump-endorsed Glenn Youngkin is promising to massively outspend Terry McAuliffe. If he makes good on his promise to drop $75 million into the Virginia governor’s race, he’ll be able to buy up the airwaves and smear Terry every chance he gets. Unless Terry raises enough money to keep up, Youngkin will pull ahead in the polls. = You know just as well as I do that TV ads can make or break a close race like this. If Terry can’t compete by building the largest grassroots team in the history of Virginia, Youngkin will use his deep pockets to flood the airwaves. All of Virginia’s progress will be gone in an instant and Donald Trump will strengthen his grip on the Republican Party heading into the 2022 midterms. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you, James Carville = Terry for VA PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

body:
Joe Biden’s betrayal on the border is out of control. | | | | |
---
Can't read this? [Click here.](https://mailchi.mp/housefreedomfund/border-betrayal?e=b2c16e6198)
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
|
---
| Peter,

Joe Biden’s betrayal on the border is out of control.

Thousands of illegal immigrants are arriving every day. Not because of oppression or Covid or any other excuse. They’re coming for one reason: JOE BIDEN AND THE DEMOCRATS WILL LET THEM IN!

[**That's why the House Freedom Caucus is sounding the alarm and fighting to seal our border.**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=16f9f9edf2&e=b2c16e6198)

The past week has been the worst of all. You probably saw Fox News’s camera drone flying over the border, showing how many illegals pass into our country over Joe Biden’s welcome mat every day. This week, the crowds under the bridge got so big the Biden Administration couldn’t ignore it.

_So what did they do?
Did they close the border?
Did they send any migrants home?_

Of course not. **THEY BANNED THE CAMERA DRONES!** They told reporters to shut off their cameras and clear the airspace.

[**Please don't let Biden hide the truth on the border: Support the House Freedom Caucus today!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=1dc37f8dfc&e=b2c16e6198)

For Joe Biden, this is more than ignorance. It’s an outrage. It’s a betrayal of his oath of office and an indictment of his entire corrupt party. The Democrats look at the violence, the disease, and the lawlessness on the border and think, _“Keep up the great work, guys.”_

It’s not that they hate America. They just hate you. They hate that your vote cancels out theirs. That in our country, you have as much say as all the woke reporters and Tech billionaires and socialist celebrities. They know a majority of Americans oppose their agenda – so rather than changing their agenda, they are changing the country.

[**JOIN THE FIGHT AGAINST BIDEN’S BETRAYAL. SUPPORT THE HOUSE FREEDOM CAUCUS TODAY!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=c102bd75dc&e=b2c16e6198)

The only way to stop Biden’s assault on America is for conservatives to stand up, fight back, and WIN the House of Representatives in 2022. With enough conservative votes, we can:

✅ Stop his amnesty.
✅ Defund his open borders.
✅ Defund sanctuary cities.
✅ Pass an E-Verify system to outlaw the hiring of illegal immigrants.
✅ Restart the construction of Trump’s Wall!

The House Freedom Caucus is fighting every day for these common-sense policies. But victory is up to us. What we do now will decide how many primaries we win, how many seats we pick up, and how many woke socialists and spineless Republicans we send home.

[**Please join us by making a contribution today!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=2394e13d03&e=b2c16e6198)

The more you give, the harder we can fight.

Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help us fight for conservative leadership in Washington.

Sincerely,

Ray Yonkura
House Freedom Fund

name: Steve Sisolak
subject: I recently announced vaccine mandates for state employees that work with vulnerable communities. This will make institutional settings safer for everyone, and I hope I have your support.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak
body:
| | |
---
[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zhkRCb1IEUbKN0NGVinwHycy0zhZnNHb8-fCzX4KtoZFGA_VpLRnIRhMPfGNA71gJxNjGsrkCGxyOUTEN2Td5Lnm68gOazhpXZoD3VqG2_-H6FQdizcs_OKyqh-hmsnEwjBQ_zxbNOe2bPCGJg0plX6nigeLJGfc78h4hur3dBkZtzEJXc9oNUpoVe2EAQrwTVtlkeV-uCQkePcLmslErACTqzyZ1uYJj1KJHS9w8SVF8BDP2KIp_-3QTj7v6T-DtzJtmo_se8KcAbl8evCAB1bc9hrnvIeN-rBAHMrTWHv8Z_qJKu3KS4L0_p5VkACNmNg0-vkESHvDVkNMlbEXuaEY1086-QF2f4PHC9u1tQ8Q0IEK0R6P8AVLkhhx9j36FdLcU2QB-4E1OWu0Slb1pbX33gRV_zub1lG_gu0glBtNX35DNmh9mf_IMXZslu2DyG8iP57y5kT_S6kFt5ayWSKDXB_iCrqT7_pHI6C_msw1x7ed6lhWsTuLkYmfLtJZbSNfjJWxY_YrKpTBgbsnV40EBbJN8ZcW-AvE-olGImeAm_8yfCr8NgT-Ka0FeJvJQ/3ff/yHVEj-rLRHyA8uLlEUlYcg/h0/vi9i0-_NZ0GmOv-_rDjIi4E4AjgI27MVnazjxPQ7tcw)
| | Folks, The COVID-19 pandemic has impacted each and every one of us significantly and it’s important to me that we remain diligent and keep our communities healthy and safe. **That’s why I signed legislation requiring Nevada employees who work with vulnerable communities in licensed health care settings or state-run detention centers to be fully vaccinated by November 1st.** We know that **vaccines are safe and highly effective at preventing severe cases of coronavirus and hospitalizations** \-- and by requiring vaccination for employees and contractors, _we can make institutional settings safer for everyone._ Throughout the pandemic I've fought for Nevadans by leading with evidence-based measures to help mitigate the spread of the virus, and ensuring that the vaccine is widely available. I’m going to continue working hard to lead Nevada’s recovery through the pandemic and beyond and I hope I have your support. **[Folks, will you add your name and let me know that you support this science-based solution to protect the health of every Nevadan?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcvIZrrsPi2ArbSUBJFmQliS6fZuARsg449Ms9DS7ApkUC7Aemn2WLOPUReoCP9tf9IyJUweXeqi14yK1hgdUYPJ24IsPQsAJ8cqk2L7VFCOAzl1T5dyNBGsjqjjOIrNYrX96h4F-sp6Wpk0LtmrMGgJHpVkOvYQ-z72iz1bJzy4fFqLHDMjnTQpnWzqC3CFDj-_qFXX6UajLzIrMY1SXr2jYuJhDqnNGp8iKcadzHmQm_CF8vJKVc4S57lYvTHJKfcufsjxeWszPl7qSCgGPeELNg_PT9XpQ2TAw1tR8_HGIkldtQW3qudLmVLzKutju-o0hXe9c4Ui9Kgb4Uui_MMI_SiAJRxU0juyX4TYrX2wZl31tPcEU6IqkVos4IoSE_1TN7qFXREnarXfvq-gqxsUNEe4S4qiKzF0KaWrs08_BnTA7ZzHyX3Y3Mttnh6BtnuIFyeYLh_TLzjXntZiAmlp624hHxnc7jU8tBuAgIXaRFm0Hd7aoRdQkowLm7Lwbg/3ff/yHVEj-rLRHyA8uLlEUlYcg/h1/0kkM1zIDoqO2eXbxuwtzKEFxbsHXTK6TcN_-oGxDqr0)** | | | [Add Your Name](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcvIZrrsPi2ArbSUBJFmQliS6fZuARsg449Ms9DS7ApkCk2f9YILX1htMzkeUCZMHeh4OtLdqtNec-_ZRxrYhY9b643GMdpr6iGZLIrrKlqLxflPxOfv2JGoPG5zQ6JqppiQPf3m8bAA7UFCPMpdgWDrqIinvso7WET1xp143bWKC0Ki0WqE8Z7igd3jQx6xZeqSrXXlRmPRmY87izcpLynArWr6AFNDvC07nKJcN1ULx2HYs8SmhPosLrDGMIuwIz-pRddvAKilJADo1e5icPC3mfp56JQQ1Sdy3IgYIkHHeC_sSescWU80EqRDESqXZmpQIA3XeRVJoL0_-mYmDmOxs1qiejWE5qYLI7Tyv2t4tavekVTZ0WlglqHvxc_GTwzJ30tyEfi6Iob6D8hTTrQB4pODb1s4sAg125fBl4XkSWLP3Fj2GyjcE2-NjXZALqcBRL09xK-sXTaBjFF-OcdUGKi25ezw4Ffhi83LsGTSrzPIDW9GOpQwhsw0lBdDsg/3ff/yHVEj-rLRHyA8uLlEUlYcg/h2/3rdaKaPPkE1Y1KVNKDVViTlgrPX1OQIyTTbR38cCcZc)

name: Finance Team, Erica Smith for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
We love this number so much because it proves we are a grassroots movement running on small-dollar donations.
#
We’ll let you in on a little secret: **$22.47** is our favorite number. Here’s why:
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/15048?t=1&akid=458%2E3698%2Ek7yl9D)
If you log onto our ActBlue page _right now_ to look at our campaign’s finances this is what you’ll see: **$22.47 is our average contribution**. It may not be impressive to some, but to us, **it means EVERYTHING**. It confirms that we’re running our race the right way.
Erica has never been about courting big-dollar donors, spending tons of hours on call-time, or attending fancy galas to socialize with the rich and powerful. She’d rather get out into the community in North Carolina and do the work to ensure that this state works for every single one of us regardless of where we live, what we look like or who we love.
When we see **$22.47** in ActBlue we see confirmation that we’re building a diverse, working-class movement right here in North Carolina (and beyond!) with small-dollar grassroots donations.
[**As you can see, we REALLY depend on folks like you who read our emails — we truly can’t do this alone.****Can you make a contribution of $22.47 today to help us continue our critical work to send Erica to the U.S. Senate in 2022?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/15048?t=2&akid=458%2E3698%2Ek7yl9D)
**[Donate](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/15255?refcode=em20210918-458&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=458%2E3698%2Ek7yl9D)**
It means the world to us that we’re connecting with voters and building a people-powered movement that reaches across the state and country.
We can win this. North Carolina deserves a Senator who supports life-changing progressive policies like reparations, a Green New deal, Medicare for All, and so much more.
[**Will you make a donation of $22.47 today to power our progressive campaign****? A single donation of $22.47 can make all the difference and help us stay on track.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/15048?t=22&akid=458%2E3698%2Ek7yl9D)
Thank you for everything,
Erica Smith’s Finance Team

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210918-458-footer&t=23&refcode2=458_3698_k7yl9D&akid=458%2E3698%2Ek7yl9D)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=458%2E3698%2Ek7yl9D)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=458%2E3698%2Ek7yl9D)

My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse.

As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it.

**Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race.**

**[I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Common Good VA so we can stop the alt-right and Marjorie Taylor Greene:](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mihG2-M7AB3dkcwwbh_95NDF-5k07JMpQozqxZk1HSyMsVw32aCm5ERJlHrEIoYyI-PL7iFU1KzcMonsK0psXUxxIJ9AUX70c2A_2cfOMqCgNN1Nf6rZdupT3175GD1-D9O4PV-iyQwwBfTvj2JJqE7aSQPznNXuU1v3uzPsTOtEHKrzKJhMyzcOKQICSPJ5J3sVX1xjbZCnXXbJ9K9aLwNJMABBhGVx-Pp6XUQsGf1rz5htFno3uUJ662EwW-9kegBOED3PNCFtdooIC-3LjjX9Ca6NZxYBApHXZdJSvt9RfvkATL2A4pMJrh4VxIApPl8AaxgrxNIyEigmJlfge7GQHqmPWalFUdDNyUsbA466aIm7zxU2y5pWxRCPnrVQR_W_pUg7r3y39G_tugm6jZzh3bbfkYYdTJ4cAnoAxFvZw/3ff/s3lFM_QdRV2kHmuXr-UCmg/h1/OBtECMzTtegIpX0bEBnvo7ryM7wVZBmdn2gYGW_pcLM)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mihG2-M7AB3dkcwwbh_95NDPnRuzudOAva14hzwKytVLg4TeXMGQj8uwXRm9YIeJaiJjGJw9kKCBVUAdsuN1PGMKUfzLVFk4DCdzC5RBJD06aNonEZTTiUZAPLpL1VRPzi5tEUliVgovNzIudazKsWMvneL9G7g40CP9GE5HDaVOXmmj0UufIrvGSrkbb3dsnnAh27k0YhuVxkGgjUOZzJ_YqtYT_TZT1WHG0NBXaHY3j0XI3eoQJLHp0V-CE3TN7DUByCUyztmX_gTZhauYPiitd04t9JcgIUQ4n8pGwSah_twSqTNgPzfpOHJfEUz8UQJm0AVxTYyS3dFodfbfOQ_3H17EjvFEoe8pa54UowMXZgcQW4Dz3qFqbxfxtEdFVfxanKzrVonxoIUJAamC7jjipuCuOSUOyYjxoEqF_MmGDbC_9guinJ_9C6hQWDij0Q/3ff/s3lFM_QdRV2kHmuXr-UCmg/h2/mdg9-Lmf5FHwL8vWPD286RvMCdkn2vV6RvgHpVYR4C8)

name: biden-alert@dccc.org
subject: President Biden: “This is our moment”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you SUPPORT President Biden's bold agenda to create a fairer economy?
| | | [We need to know: Do you SUPPORT President Biden's bold agenda to create a fairer economy?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/_)
---

We're so proud of President Biden.

**He just delivered a STIRRING speech outlining his plan to create a fairer economy for ALL Americans --_and he 's counting on all of us to join him in the fight:_**

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)

President Biden's bold economic agenda would:

**✔ LOWER** health care premiums and prescription drug costs,

**✔ REDUCE** the cost of childcare and eldercare,

**✔ EXTEND** the Child Tax Credit passed under our American Rescue Plan -- _and so much more._

But Republicans have sworn to do everything in their power to oppose President Biden and our Democrats' efforts to Build Back Better on behalf of hard-working Americans.

**It 's on us to overpower out-of-touch Republicans -- so we're gathering data on where our best grassroots supporters stand on President Biden's HISTORIC agenda.**

---
[Before midnight, let us know: Do you SUPPORT President Biden's bold agenda to create a fairer economy?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/-YK-)
---

Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45641524&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA4NDAxODQzOQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45641524&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA4NDAxODQzOQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

clean_body: A FREE Country. Friend, Joe Biden is mandating the COVID Vaccine - can you believe it? He is trampling the rights of everyday Americans, like YOU, to appease his liberal base who wants to control every aspect of your life. We need to make something clear to the Democrats: THIS IS AMERICA, and the American FLAG, which symbolizes FREEDOM and JUSTICE, allows us to live our lives FREELY. To fight back, we released our LIMITED-EDITION " THIS IS MY FREEDOM PASSPORT" shirt, and because you've always been a TOP supporter of President Trump, he wants to give you one FIRST. We 'll hold your shirt for one hour, Friend. After that, we'll be forced to give it to the next Patriot in line. We don't anticipate these limited-edition shirts to stay in stock for long, Friend. Once they are gone, will we NOT restock. So, get yours now before it's too late. Thank you, Team Trump P.S. As always, everything is proudly made in America.
